title: schedonorus compressus
intro: Schedonorus compressus, also known as timothy grass, is a perennial grass species native to North America. The medicinal properties of Schedonorus compressus include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The health benefits of timothy grass include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Timothy grass can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
